_comment: KING-KILLER = king HadesHappy v15 config (configs/h200_v15_full.json on recipe-v0.3.8) + our op4-safe edges. Arch = _v7lite canonical DEFAULTS (tie_embeddings=False untied zero-init lm_head, unet_skip=True, logit_z_coef=1e-4 z-loss) -> NOT overridden -> op4 strict-load matches by construction. Our added edges: (1) EMA tail-average over the cosine decay tail (headline, ~-0.01 bpb OOD); (2) compile=true for budget headroom (needs the determinism-off train.py edit; state_dict saved from UNCOMPILED module per train.py:103 -> op4-safe, no _orig_mod prefix); (3) fresh independent seed 7777 (variance draw for the sub-0.013 margin). total_steps 4500 (~2.36B tok, fits the 2.4B prep, ~2h compiled) vs king 5150/2.70B: a small token headwind traded for VM-time safety. ema_start_step=2700=0.6*4500 (cosine low-LR tail).
